component.name: Calaos Installer
component.summary: Create and edit home automation configurations for the Calaos system

description.p: Calaos Installer is a desktop application for creating and editing home automation configurations for the Calaos system. It provides a graphical interface to manage rooms, I/O devices, rules, and automation scenarios.
It also includes Calaos Machine Creator, a tool for writing Calaos OS images to USB drives and SD cards.

ul.li: Create and organize rooms with input/output devices
Configure automation rules with conditions and actions
Manage Wago PLC modules, DALI lighting, and other hardware
Design touchscreen interfaces with the Remote UI Editor
Upload configurations to Calaos controllers via FTP
Write Calaos OS images to USB/SD media
Support for Zigbee2MQTT, Philips Hue, MySensors, KNX, and more
